summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HimPrash Admin CMS. All major features working correctly including admin login, product CRUD, category management, CSV upload, and live website sync. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend admin dashboard fully operational, and main website integration confirmed.
passed_tests: Admin login page loads at /admin-panel-himprash with username and password fields
Login with admin/admin123 redirects to dashboard
Wrong credentials show error message
Admin dashboard shows product table with all products
Admin search filters products by name instantly
Admin category filter works
Add Product button opens form modal with all required fields
Product creation via admin adds to table
Product editing updates table (confirmed with EDITED product)
Product deletion removes from table
Categories tab shows categories with delete buttons
CSV Upload button opens modal
Logout button works and redirects to login
Products created in admin appear on main website (live sync confirmed)
Offer price shows with strikethrough on product cards and detail page
All backend admin API endpoints working (POST, PUT, DELETE /api/admin/products)
Category management APIs working (POST, DELETE /api/admin/categories)
Bulk product creation API working (POST /api/admin/products/bulk)
Main website navigation and functionality intact
Product detail pages load correctly with offer price display
